_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: when the selumetinib + rigosertib combination was tested in the MPNST PDX mentioned, control of tumor growth was superior to either monotherapy, and there was a corresponding increase in overall survival. The response of this combination in the PDX model was significantly better than the selumetinib + digoxin combination
details: Selumetinib + rigosertib combination showed superior tumor growth control compared to monotherapy with corresponding increase in overall survival, and significantly better response than selumetinib + digoxin combination
